name: ci-cd-generator-ai
description: Generate CI/CD pipeline configurations for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and Jenkins. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_pipeline
tools.description: Generate a CI/CD pipeline configuration for the specified language and platform (github, gitlab).

tools.name: validate_config
tools.description: Validate a CI/CD configuration for common errors and best practices.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available CI/CD pipeline templates and supported languages.

tools.name: optimize_stages
tools.description: Suggest optimizations for a CI/CD pipeline: caching, parallelism, matrix builds.
